## Summary

Describe the change and the user-visible effect, if any.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` is green
- [ ] `npm run compile` succeeds
- [ ] I did not commit the generated `media/player.js`
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]` if behavior changed
- [ ] I updated `README.md` if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] I linked the related issue
